name: Twin Disc, Incorporated
description: Twin Disc, Incorporated is a leading global designer, manufacturer, and distributor of power transmission equipment for marine and land-based applications. Founded in 1918 and headquartered in the United States, the company provides a wide range of products, including marine transmissions, surface drives, power take-offs, and electronic control systems. Serving diverse industries such as oil and gas, military, construction, and commercial marine, Twin Disc is recognized for its precision-engineered solutions that enhance performance, reliability, and efficiency. The company continues to innovate by integrating advanced electric and hybrid propulsion systems to meet evolving global energy and environmental standards.
